steps.title: Chaining the multipliers
steps.content: Percentage increases are chained by multiplication. The 2007–2008 increase of 14% means multiplying by \$1.14$. The 2008–2009 increase of 4% means multiplying by \$1.04$. Therefore, the ratio of 2009 earnings to 2007 earnings is: $$y = 1.14 \times 1.04$$
